title: Pipeline Diagnostic Report
description: Schema for the pipeline_diagnostic.json written when a stage fails validation after retry

pipeline_run_id.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the pipeline run, e.g. '2026-02-21T14:32:00Z'

stages.description: Keyed by stage name. Each value describes that stage's validation outcome.

status.description: Overall outcome of this stage. 'retried_pass' means it failed initially but passed after retry; 'retried_fail' means it failed both times.

checks.description: Individual validation checks run for this stage

retry_attempted.description: Whether a retry was attempted for this stage

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock seconds the stage took to run (null if not measured)

error_context_sent_to_agent.description: The error context string appended to the agent prompt on retry, if any

name.description: Short description of the check, e.g. 'file_exists', 'json_valid', 'conditional_logic'

detail.description: Human-readable description of what was found (even on pass, for debugging)

got.description: What was actually found (for fail cases)

file.description: Which file the problem was found in, relative to the base directory

total_checks.description: Total number of validation checks run across all stages

warned.description: Number of checks that produced warnings (non-fatal)

pipeline_halted.description: Whether the pipeline was halted due to unrecoverable failures

halt_reason.description: If pipeline_halted is true, a brief explanation of why

errors.description: Compact list of all failures in 'stage:check — detail' format
examples: ADMINISTER_SURVEY:conditional_logic — Q7 entity E003 uses category C05 not in Q5 for R002
